figure_captions.assembly-robustness-response: Conditional modeled-valid probability across transverse-backlash allowances and uniform shaft-location tolerances at zero housing-clearance erosion. Probabilities are digital-model outcomes, not measured manufacturing yield.
figure_captions.load-total-order-sensitivity: Total-order sensitivity indices for the declared static-load uncertainty model. Torque dominates the modeled response; the distributions are study assumptions rather than measured duty data.
figure_captions.solver-anytime-largest-domain: Feasible recovery and negative-proof rate on the largest declared tooth domain across candidate budgets. Stochastic negative classifications are not proofs.
figure_captions.strength-coupling-outcomes: Outcome changes after static tooth-root admission is coupled to bounded synthesis. Retained, redesigned, and infeasible refer only to the declared digital model.

highlights: Executable knowledge yields independently checkable synthesis certificates.
Complete bounded search distinguishes negative proofs from heuristic failure.
CP-SAT proves all scaled negative cases under every declared candidate budget.
Static tooth-root admission redesigns one case and rejects two bounded cases.
Every reported table and figure is hash-bound and byte-reproducible.
